config.backup.create_desc: Creates an .ago archive (ZIP) with config, prompts, data and skills. When a password is set, all vault secrets (API keys, tokens) are also securely included — ideal for migrating to a new instance (e.g. with systemd-injected master key).
config.backup.import_warning: Important: Import overwrites existing files. Config, prompts and data will be replaced. A restart is recommended after import.
config.backup.no_password_warning: Χωρίς κωδικό πρόσβασης, δεν θα δημιουργηθεί αντίγραφο ασφαλείας για API κλειδιά, κωδικό σύνδεσης ή tokens. Για μια ολοκληρωμένη μετανάστευση, ορίστε πάντα έναν κωδικό πρόσβασης.
config.backup.password_hint: Archive will be encrypted with AES-256-GCM. Leave empty for plain ZIP.
config.backup.password_required: Encrypted backup — please enter the password.
config.backup.vault_included_hint: 🔐 Vault secrets (API keys, login password, tokens) will be included.
